messages.content: A grandfather clock consisting of a tall rectangular cabinet, a circular clock face mounted near the top front, and a pendulum sphere hanging beneath it inside the lower body.
A pirate ship with a long hull, three vertical mast cylinders rising from the deck, and triangular sails attached midway up each mast.
A gas station canopy supported by four corner pillars, with two fuel pumps directly underneath the center.
A locomotive engine with a smokestack rising from the front top section, and two headlight spheres mounted on either side of the nose.
[locomotive body][0,0,0,0,0,0,[4,1.5,2]][smokestack][0,hd,fh,0,0,0,[0.3,0.3,1]][headlight sphere][sym(hw*0.5),fd,hh,0,0,0,0.15]
A treasure chest with a rounded lid sitting on top, and two decorative metal handles attached to the left and right sides.
[treasure chest base][0,0,0,0,0,0,[2,1.2,1]][rounded lid][0,0,fh,0,0,0,[1,1,0.5]][metal handle][sym(fw),0,hh,90,0,0,0.2]
A castle gatehouse with two guard towers standing on both outer sides and a banner hanging above the central entrance.
A laboratory workstation with a microscope positioned on the back left corner, and three sample vials lined up across the front edge.
[lab workstation][0,0,0,0,0,0,[3,2,1]][microscope][-fw+0.3,-fd+0.3,fh,0,0,0,0.6][sample vial][-fw*0.5,fd,fh,0,0,0,0.1][sample vial][0,fd,fh,0,0,0,0.1][sample vial][fw*0.5,fd,fh,0,0,0,0.1]
A wizard hat cone with a circular brim torus wrapped around the bottom and a glowing jewel embedded on the front.
[wizard hat cone][0,0,0,0,0,0,[1,1,2]][hat brim torus][0,0,-hh,90,0,0,1.2][glowing jewel][0,hd,hh,0,0,0,0.15]
A drawbridge platform with two heavy chains rising diagonally upward toward support points on either side.
A snowman made from a large lower sphere, a medium sphere resting on top, a smaller head sphere above that, and a carrot cone sticking from the front.
[lower snow sphere][0,0,0,0,0,0,1.5][middle snow sphere][0,0,fh,0,0,0,1.0][head snow sphere][0,0,2fh,0,0,0,0.7][carrot cone][0,hd,2fh,0,90,0,0.15]
A medieval battering ram with four wheels underneath and a peaked roof shelter centered above.
A vending machine with a transparent display window occupying the upper front half and a dispensing tray recessed near the bottom.
A helicopter fuselage with a long tail boom extending behind it, a main rotor on top, and a tail rotor mounted at the rear end.
A jukebox cabinet with a glowing arch mounted over the top front and two speaker circles embedded low on both sides.
A fountain basin with a central statue rising from the middle and four water jets surrounding it at equal distances.
[fountain basin][0,0,0,0,0,0,[4,4,0.5]][central statue][0,0,fh,0,0,0,1.2][water jet][hw,0,fh,0,0,0,0.1][water jet][-hw,0,fh,0,0,0,0.1][water jet][0,hd,fh,0,0,0,0.1][water jet][0,-hd,fh,0,0,0,0.1]
A king's throne with two lion sculptures sitting on the armrests and a crown emblem centered high on the backrest.
[royal throne][0,0,0,0,0,0,[2,2,3]][lion sculpture][sym(hw),0,hh,0,0,0,0.4][crown emblem][0,0,fh,0,0,0,0.25]
A space capsule with three landing legs folded outward beneath the body and a communication antenna protruding from the top.
A record player base with a circular platter centered on top and a tonearm extending inward from the right side.
A giant mushroom with a thick stem cylinder supporting a wide cap overhead, and several tiny mushrooms clustered around the base.
A ceremonial altar block with two candles standing at the front corners, a sacred book resting in the center, and a floating halo ring suspended above.
